segments.text: That jump just got shut down right there!
segments.original_text: 今ジャンプ潰れてたっすね

segments.text: But considering the chance he used it earlier, and
segments.original_text: ただ先ほど使った可能性と

full_text: That jump just got shut down right there! And things got really tight But considering the chance he used it earlier, and resources ran out

corrections.rule: misheard: ジャッキ→ジャンプ
